name: CSA
author: Empenn
command-line: echo '--------------ls -l ../------------' && ls -l ; unzip [INPUT] -d INPUTDIR; rename -v 's/\.nii\.gz$/.nii/' INPUTDIR/*.nii.gz; gzip INPUTDIR/*.nii; mkdir OUTPUT; bash /usr/local/bin/launch-script.sh INPUTDIR OUTPUT && cp input_params.json OUTPUT/ && tar -cvzf [OUTPUT_FILE] OUTPUT
